gloss: and not
why: وما يعلم تأويله إلا الله — ما نافية; not relative/interrogative here

gloss: a transgressor
why: اسم فاعل 'exceeding'; غير باغ ولا عاد — NOT the tribe ʿĀd

gloss: that … not
why: أَنْ مصدرية + لا نافية; subjunctive

gloss: indeed / behold
why: opening attention particle; distinct from أَلَّا

gloss: so not
why: فما كان لكم علينا من فضل — negation, not 'whatever'

gloss: when
why: حينية; distinguish from لَمَّا jussive 'not yet' and لِما 'for what'

gloss: there is no
why: لا ريب فيه — النافية للجنس + mabnī ism

gloss: do not
why: لا تؤاخذنا — لا الناهية

gloss: not (… except)
why: إن الكافرون إلا في غرور — نافية not conditional

gloss: who / those who
why: ومن الناس من يقول — relative; fatḥa مَن ≠ مِن

gloss: and among / and of
why: kasra on mīm under و = preposition

gloss: why
why: لـ + ما; ≠ لَمْ 'did not'

gloss: did not
why: لم يلد — jussive, past meaning

gloss: nay!
why: deterrence; ≠ كُلّ 'all/every'

gloss: how
why: أَنَّىٰ يكون لي غلام — 'how'; ≠ أَنِّي 'that I'

gloss: that I
why: أنّ + ياء المتكلم; emphatic-clause 'that I'

gloss: restricts
why: يبسط الرزق لمن يشاء ويقدر — paired contrast → 'restricts', not merely 'is able'

gloss: forbearing
why: إن إبراهيم لحليم — human attribute, not the divine Name by default

gloss: and sacrifice
why: فصل لربك وانحر — imperative construction

gloss: dedicated (freed for service)
why: نذرت لك ما في بطني محررا — ism mafʿūl, accusative ḥāl/state

gloss: have we not
why: ألم نشرح — interrogative hamza + لم negation (rhetorical)

gloss: madness
why: ما بصاحبهم من جنّة — جِنّة 'madness', not جَنّة 'garden'

gloss: a model of excellence
why: إن إبراهيم كان أمة — 'leader/model', not just 'community'

gloss: and restricts
why: يبسط الرزق لمن يشاء ويقدر — contrast restricts

gloss: all / every
why: على كل شيء قدير — كُلّ 'every'; ≠ كَلَّا deterrence

gloss: with peace
why: بِـ governs a majrūr host; host-only 'peace' omits the preposition

gloss: at Badr
why: attached bāʾ marks the locative/prepositional relation to the proper noun

gloss: by the fig
why: واو القسم acts like a genitive preposition; governed noun is not host-only 'fig'

gloss: and by the olive
why: second oath token preserves both coordination/oath force and governed noun

gloss: and by the star(s)
why: written token carries wāw plus bāʾ relation; stem-only 'stars' is incomplete

gloss: they argue/dispute with you (masc. sg.)
why: واو الجماعة is the subject and كَ is the attached object pronoun

gloss: taught
why: مفعول/اسم مفعول pattern; not the infinitive 'to teach'

gloss: that (for you all)
why: demonstrative ذاك with plural address suffix; must not inherit لِـ 'for' or emphatic لَ

gloss: so that is (for you women)
why: ف prefix is a visible discourse particle and كُنَّ addresses a feminine plural group

gloss: ask you
why: following explicit subject does not erase the attached كَ object pronoun or the finite verb parse

gloss: so We destroyed them
why: the fā' role, Form IV verb, 1pl subject, and 3mp object must be in the parse breakdown

gloss: O
why: vocative token cannot be collapsed to 'you (who)' without identifying call, bridge, attention, and addressee

gloss: weak
why: visible gloss may be lexically right, but rich certification needs exact case/role and entry-linkage proof

gloss: and was created
why: wāw role and passive voice must remain visible in parse proof even when the phrase is readable

gloss: because of/for their sins
why: i'rab sees both the prepositional relation and attached possessor; host-only 'Sin.' fails

gloss: with/by the Spirit
why: bā' relation and referent both affect the hover; do not certify from the noun alone

gloss: because of/for your sins
why: suffix-pending alone hides the bā' relation and possessed host stack

gloss: and by Mount
why: the oath particle governs the host; host-only Mount is incomplete

gloss: and by this
why: the demonstrative needs the oath/coordinating function; bare 'this' is not enough

gloss: O my people
why: a readable 'my people' gloss still hides the vocative call/addressee structure unless the pieces are explicit

gloss: dry
why: raw surface prefix matching would misroute a lexical dry/dried word as a vocative

gloss: pending: hot/boiling-water context review, not intimate-friend propagation
why: VN-01 found a same-surface nominal where the visible hover selected the friend sense in a punishment context

gloss: pending: deterrent/punishment sense review, not shackles propagation
why: same-root nominal senses diverge; exact token role and sense must be certified before repair

gloss: pending: contextual intimate-action wording with object suffix visible
why: the context phrase can be correct while still failing rich certification if the هُنَّ object is not visible

gloss: pending: nominal comparison role, not verb infinitive
why: VN-01 found a nominal comparison token carrying a verb gloss; nahw must certify the local construction
